description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker with a light gray fabric upper and white rubber sole, designed for everyday urban wear. The shoe features white laces threaded through four pairs of eyelets, and the tongue is made from the same gray fabric as the rest of the upper. The collar is slightly padded and the interior lining appears to be dark, likely black or charcoal. The outsole is white with a thin black stripe running along the edge, providing a subtle contrast. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements, making it versatile for various casual outfits.
description: A light gray, low-top casual sneaker with white laces and a white rubber sole, featuring a minimalist and versatile design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel, padded collar, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth gray fabric upper, white sole, and lacing system.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe box, white laces, and the rounded shape of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the clean lines and minimalist profile.
